title: Bragawatts Surge: AI Gigawatt Deals as BTC Holds $77K
description: NYT coins 'bragawatts' for AI's massive gigawatt power contracts. Blockchain efficiencies counter costs while BTC trades at $77,834 amid Fear & Greed at 33.

title: Darrow AI targets digital litigation risk with webinars on ERISA health plans and data-driven legal intelligence
description: Darrow AI is pitching its legal intelligence platform to law firms and litigation funders as a tool for spotting litigation signals in data-heavy sectors. Webinars in late April will cover digital-economy disputes and ERISA health plan cases.

title: AI rush meets workforce lag: Is readiness becoming the real crisis behind automation?
description: A 2026 analysis by Resume Now, based on Lightcast data, reveals a widening gap between rapid AI adoption and workforce readiness across key industries. Frontline sectors remain most exposed, with training lagging behind deployment. The report warns that without structural investment in upskilling, AI may not eliminate jobs—but could leave workers increasingly sidelined and disempowered.

title: Online courses make AI education more accessible to non-technical learners in India
description: Indians without technical degrees are moving into AI careers through online courses as demand for AI talent outpaces hiring. Platforms offer flexible, low-cost training in tools employers want, from prompt engineering to machine learning.

title: An AI hater’s guide to keeping LLMs as far from your workflow as possible in 2026
description: A freelance gaming journalist's guide to ditching Chrome, Office, Gmail, Photoshop, and other AI-infested tools in favor of alternatives that just do the normal stuff. Read More
